windows.embed_text_v2: Top-down flat lay laying out candle making tools on white marble: double boiler with metal pouring pitcher on hotplate, silver digital scale, blue silicone spatula, metal cutter, glass thermometer
windows.summary_v2: A top-down flat-lay introduces candle-making tools one by one on a marble surface: a double boiler with pouring pitcher, a digital scale, a silicone spatula, a cutting tool and a thermometer.

seconds_v2.desc: An empty white marble surface, shot top-down, before any candle-making tools are laid out.
A black electric hotplate holding a pouring pitcher inside a double-boiler pot slides into the top-left of the flat-lay.
The double boiler with its metal pouring pitcher sits at the left on the marble, the rest of the surface still bare.
A silver digital kitchen scale is placed to the right of the double boiler on the marble.
A blue silicone stirring spatula is laid between the double boiler and the scale.
A clear plastic measuring container appears near the top while the scale, spatula and boiler stay arranged.
A metal cutting tool with a wooden handle is added at the top of the flat-lay beside the other tools.
A glass thermometer is placed between the spatula and the scale, joining the tool lineup.
The full set of candle-making tools is arranged on the marble: double boiler with pitcher, scale, spatula, cutter, thermometer and a wick holder.
